steps.title: Set up the sine ratio
steps.content: In a right triangle, $\sin\theta=\dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$. From the figure, the side opposite $x^\circ$ is 16 and the hypotenuse is 23.

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.content: Therefore, $$\sin x^\circ=\frac{16}{23}\approx0.6956.$$ The exact fraction $16/23$ and the listed decimal forms are accepted, so equivalent entries receive credit.
